2603.19888.title: Integrating Meta-Features with Knowledge Graph Embeddings for Meta-Learning
2603.19888.paper_summary: The vast collection of machine learning records available on the web presents a significant opportunity for meta-learning, where past experiments are leveraged to improve performance. Two crucial meta-learning tasks are pipeline performance estimation (PPE), which predicts pipeline performance on target datasets, and dataset performance-based similarity estimation (DPSE), which identifies datasets with similar performance patterns. Existing approaches primarily rely on dataset meta-features (e.g., number of instances, class entropy, etc.) to represent datasets numerically and approximate these meta-learning tasks. However, these approaches often overlook the wealth of past experimental results and pipeline metadata available. This limits their ability to capture dataset - pipeline interactions that reveal performance similarity patterns. In this work, we propose KGmetaSP, a knowledge-graph-embeddings approach that leverages existing experiment data to capture these interactions and improve both PPE and DPSE. We represent datasets and pipelines within a unified knowledge graph (KG) and derive embeddings that support pipeline-agnostic meta-models for PPE and distance-based retrieval for DPSE. To validate our approach, we construct a large-scale benchmark comprising 144,177 OpenML experiments, enabling a rich cross-dataset evaluation. KGmetaSP enables accurate PPE using a single pipeline-agnostic meta-model and improves DPSE over baselines. The proposed KGmetaSP, KG, and benchmark are released, establishing a new reference point for meta-learning and demonstrating how consolidating open experiment data into a unified KG advances the field.
2603.19888.paper_summary_zh: 網路上龐大的機器學習紀錄庫為元學習提供了重要機會，在這裡過去的實驗被用來提升性能。兩個關鍵的元學習任務是管道性能預估（PPE），它預測目標數據集上的管道性能，以及基於數據集性能的相似性預估（DPSE），它識別具有相似性能模式的數據集。現有的方法主要依賴於數據集的元特徵（例如，實例數、類別熵等）來數字化表示數據集並近似這些元學習任務。然而，這些方法往往忽視了過去實驗結果和管道元數據的豐富性。這限制了它們捕捉數據集與管道之間互動的能力，這些互動揭示了性能相似性模式。在本研究中，我們提出了KGmetaSP，一種知識圖譜嵌入方法，利用現有的實驗數據來捕捉這些互動並改善PPE和DPSE。我們在統一的知識圖譜（KG）中表示數據集和管道，並推導出支持管道無關的元模型以進行PPE和基於距離的檢索以進行DPSE的嵌入。為了驗證我們的方法，我們構建了一個大型基準，包括144,177個OpenML實驗，使得豐富的跨數據集評估成為可能。KGmetaSP使用單一的管道無關元模型實現準確的PPE，並在基準上改善DPSE。所提出的KGmetaSP、KG和基準已經發布，為元學習建立了一個新的參考點，並展示了如何將開放實驗數據整合到統一的KG中以推進該領域。
2603.19888.author: Antonis Klironomos et.al.
2603.19888.authors: Antonis Klironomos, Ioannis Dasoulas, Francesco Periti, Mohamed Gad-Elrab, Heiko Paulheim, Anastasia Dimou, Evgeny Kharlamov
